variables.notes: No explicit total current assets line is reported on the Balance Sheet preview. This appears to be an IFRS insurance-style statement of financial position with asset categories rather than a reported current-assets total.

candidates.row_label: Cash at Bank and in Hand
candidates.why: Balance-sheet cash line; best match for cash and cash equivalents.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Cash-flow ending cash balance, but CHE should come from the balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents, beginning of year
candidates.why: Cash-flow beginning cash balance, not the preferred balance-sheet stock measure.

final_choice.row_label: Cash at Bank and in Hand

variables.notes: Selected the balance-sheet cash line as preferred.
No explicit total current liabilities line is reported on the Balance Sheet preview.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Direct match to short-term debt/current portion of long-term debt and explicitly excludes leases, which matches the baseline STD definition.
Candidate label for current debt maturities, but it appears blank in the preview while a cleaner explicit current-portion line exists.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: Preferred the explicit non-lease current debt line. Excluded lease obligation rows to comply with baseline STD definition.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Best balance-sheet proxy for property, plant and equipment; represents reported tangible fixed assets.
Balancing line, not a clean reported PPE measure.

variables.notes: Used the reported tangible assets line as the best available PPE measure.

candidates.row_label: Total cash flow from operating activities
candidates.why: Direct match for net cash flow from operating activities.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Premiums
candidates.why: Operating subcomponent, not the total operating cash flow measure.

final_choice.row_label: Total cash flow from operating activities
